result.markdown:
---
title: Statistical Inference Review # Title of the document

# Bibliography Details
bibliography: review.bib  # Name of bib file in the same folder 
bibliographystyle: apa                   # Bibliography style

execute:
  warning: false
  message: false

# Below will do html by default. To render the entire project
# Use the following code:
# quarto::quarto_render("Lab2WriteUp.qmd")

format:
  html: 
    number-sections: TRUE
    code-fold: TRUE
    code-line-numbers: TRUE
    cap-location: top 
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    number-sections: TRUE
    reference-section-title: "References" 
    code-line-numbers: TRUE
    cap-location: top 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{amsmath}
          \usepackage[dvipsnames]{xcolor}
          \usepackage[shortlabels]{enumitem}
          \usepackage{parskip}
          \usepackage{hyperref}
          \usepackage{geometry}
          \usepackage{float}
    geometry:
      - top=0.75in
      - left=0.75in
      - bottom=0.75in
      - right=0.75in
format-links: [pdf]
---

 \normalsize


::: {.cell}

:::


 \normalsize
